name: mailchimp-mcp
description: MCP server for the Mailchimp Marketing API. 227 tools for managing campaigns, audiences, members, templates, segments, Classic Automations and Customer Journey workarounds, reports, e-commerce (carts, promo rules and codes), A/B testing, landing pages, CRM notes, multi-account support, File Manager, surveys, signup forms, verified domains, deliverability, full e-commerce writes, and more.

apiKey.title: Mailchimp API Key
apiKey.description: Your Mailchimp API key. Get one at https://mailchimp.com/help/about-api-keys/. Format: key-dc (e.g. abc123def456-us21).

readOnly.title: Read-Only Mode
readOnly.description: When true, all write operations are blocked. Useful for safe exploration.

dryRun.title: Dry-Run Mode
dryRun.description: When true, write operations return a preview of what would happen without executing.
